windows.command: Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 34872).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; wally install; rojo sourcemap default.project.json --output sourcemap.json; wally-package-types --sourcemap sourcemap.json Packages/

linux.command: fuser -k 34872/tcp 2>/dev/null; wally install && rojo sourcemap default.project.json --output sourcemap.json && wally-package-types --sourcemap sourcemap.json Packages/
